The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

But lucky you, you're not like most humans. You're owned by a member of the imperial family. The bad news? This guy is a rat bastard who thinks enslaving a pack of humans as sex toys is the same as saving them/found family.

Not that Fisher minds. This sure as hell beats being a stray human and he thrives here. The only question is, will you?

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

Tips for chatting with Th'Roun & Fisher

  • Decide on a good backstory!

  • Randomly trauma dump

  • Favor one over the other, they both love watching.

  • Oh gosh. You fell and have a bloody nose, way to make a good first impression.

  • Oh GOSH! You're allergic to Th'Roun's favorite oils and can't stop sneezing at Fisher

  • Oh gosh don't make me say it, i'm shy! (Fuck Th'Roun while you hold Fisher's hand, trust)

  • Th'Roun is supposed to be chill, but if you're overly meek he gets irritated in this bot. Tried my best to avoid it, but let's just say the 'uwu, i'm shy' won't get you very far here. He literally called Jet in to finish him off and I was SHOOK (but honestly? nice.)
